name: TC-26: Restock Product increases Current Stock
description: Restocking a product through the restock modal increases its current stock.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Click the Master Produk sidebar navigation item
Click the RESTOCK button for a target product row in the table
Type 15 in the Tambah Kuantitas input field
Click the Simpan Restock button to submit
Verify the modal closes and the table updates
Verify that the product's current stock has increased by 15 in the table row
